metadata.title: MarketMind — Algorithmic Trading Assistant
metadata.description: Open-source desktop app with advanced chart visualization, automated setup detection, backtesting engine, and multi-exchange support.

hero.title: Algorithmic Trading,
hero.description: A powerful desktop application combining advanced chart visualization with automated setup detection, backtesting, and multi-exchange trading — built for traders who demand precision.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: Professional-grade tools for algorithmic trading, all in one open-source desktop application.

charts.title: Advanced Charts
charts.description: High-performance Canvas-based kline rendering with 35+ technical indicators, drawing tools, volume profile, and multi-timeframe views.

heatmap.title: Liquidity Heatmap
heatmap.description: Real-time order book depth visualization with thermal overlay, bid/ask separation, and liquidation event tracking stored in TimescaleDB.

pineScript.title: PineScript Engine
pineScript.description: Write and run strategies in PineScript v5 — the same language used by TradingView. 106 built-in strategies ready to use, or create your own.

screener.title: Screener & Scanners (beta)
screener.description: Market screener with customizable filters, real-time scanners for setup detection, and market-wide indicator dashboards. Currently in beta.

autoTrading.title: Auto-Trading
autoTrading.description: Execute trades automatically with 105+ backtested strategies, OCO orders, risk management, and real-time monitoring via WebSocket.

backtesting.title: Backtesting Engine
backtesting.description: Walk-forward optimization, Monte Carlo simulation, batch testing across multiple strategies, symbols, and timeframes.

security.title: Bank-Grade Security
security.description: AES-256-CBC encrypted storage for API keys, Argon2 password hashing, session-based auth with optional 2FA.

exchanges.title: Binance Integration
exchanges.description: Trade crypto on Binance with deep WebSocket integration — futures, spot, OCO, trailing stops, and real-time streams.

volumeProfile.title: Volume Profile
volumeProfile.description: Price-level volume distribution with Point of Control, Value Area, and buy/sell separation — calculated from klines or real-time trade data.

openSource.title: 100% Open Source
openSource.description: MIT licensed. Inspect, modify, and contribute to the entire codebase — from frontend to backend.

screenshots.title: See It in Action
screenshots.subtitle: A glimpse of MarketMind's interface across different views and themes.

techStack.title: Built With Modern Tech
techStack.subtitle: A carefully chosen stack for performance, type safety, and developer experience.

stats.title: By the Numbers
stats.subtitle: Quality and scale you can trust.

openSource.title: Free & Open Source
openSource.subtitle: MarketMind is MIT licensed and built in the open. Contributions are welcome.
